title: Mining and Resources
description: Learn to gather resources from the world

content.text:
Mining Basics

Mining is how you gather valuable resources like coal, iron, and diamonds from underground.

Mining Tools:

  • Pickaxe - For mining stone and ores
  • Shovel - For digging dirt, sand, and gravel
  • Axe - For chopping wood quickly
  • Different materials have different durability and speed

Common Ores:

  • Coal - Found near surface, used for torches and fuel
  • Iron - Found underground, used for better tools
  • Gold - Found deeper, used for special items
  • Diamond - Very rare, found at deep levels

Mining Tips:

  • Always bring torches for light
  • Watch out for lava
  • Don't dig straight down
  • Mark your path to find your way back
content.task: Craft a stone pickaxe and mine until you find coal ore. Make torches with the coal.
